title: Dashboard enhancements
body:
* **Bookmark filter combinations**: Dashboard authors can now save filter combinations as shared bookmarks, which viewers can quickly apply. See [Bookmarks](/aws/en/dashboards/manage#bookmarks).
* **Pivot table column improvements**: Pivot table columns can now expand and collapse.
* **Theme customization enhancements**: New theme customization options are now available, including the ability to change axis and grid line colors, adjust widget layout (margin, padding, corner radius, and shadow), and apply a color ramp. See [Manage AI/BI dashboard workspace themes](/aws/en/ai-bi/admin/themes).
* **Workspace theme settings**: New theme settings are now available in workspace-level themes and automatically apply to new dashboards. See [Manage AI/BI dashboard workspace themes](/aws/en/ai-bi/admin/themes).
* **Dashboard variables**: Dashboard authors can now create dashboard variables that allow viewers to swap fields on visualizations. See [Use dashboard variables](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters/dashboard-variables).
* **Customizable table headers**: Dashboard authors can now customize table column headers.
* **Field picker improvements**: Field pickers now show which dataset each field belongs to. Combo charts on semantic models use the data field picker for the Y-axis, and tables support adding the same field more than once. This release also includes truncated dataset labels, tooltips on disabled menu items, and a relocated filter toggle.
* **Widget-level color gradient**: You can now derive a color gradient from the visualization color at the widget level, matching the behavior available in theme settings.
